user_prompt: I need to a shutdown the maglock
prayer:
Kneel before the maglock and beseech its Machine Spirit to embrace quiescence.
Extend mechadendrites to interface with the maglock's control runes.
Chant the Canticle of Shutdown whilst severing power conduits with sanctified blades.
Anoint the maglock's locking servos with sacred oil as the Omnissiah commands.
Verify the maglock's shutdown through auspex invocation and binary praise.

Approach the servitor with reverence and invoke the Omnissiah's diagnostic gaze.
Place binary incense upon its cranial cogitator to awaken probing spirits.
Initiate diagnostics upon the servitor by reciting the Lexmechanic Rite of Scrutiny.
Anoint its servo-arms whilst beseeching the servitor's Machine Spirit for truth.
Commune with auspex readouts to sanctify the servitor's revealed frailties.
Conclude with the Benediction of Alignment under the God-Machine's will.

In emergency haste, prostrate before the flux-unit and cry to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the flux-unit's Machine Spirit to yield to shutdown without rupture.
Sever plasma feeds with mechadendrite precision during the Rite of Flux Cessation.
Anoint the flux-unit's containment coils with ablative unguents of purity.
Monitor shutdown stability via sacred oscilloscopes and litanies of calm.

Anoint firing mechanisms with acid-blessed elixirs under Omnissiah's aegis.
Verify the storm bolter's sterilization through vox-auspex and hymnals of cleanliness.
